narrative:
Precinct Dover 2-A (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 655 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
